dailyOutages.plant: Full interruption (around 495MW) occurred from 09:31 to 09:47 hrs under Bhaluka, Mymensingh, Netrokona, Kishoreganj and Bajitpur substations
dailyOutages.reason: due to the tripping of Ashuganj-Bajitpur ckt-1 showing distance relay from Ashuganj end (NB: Ashuganj-Bajitpur ckt-2 was under shut down condition). Now, no interruption is occurring.
dailyOutages.full_desc: Full interruption (around 495MW) occurred from 09:31 to 09:47 hrs under Bhaluka, Mymensingh, Netrokona, Kishoreganj and Bajitpur substations due to the tripping of Ashuganj-Bajitpur ckt-1 showing distance relay from Ashuganj end (NB: Ashuganj-Bajitpur ckt-2 was under shut down condition). Now, no interruption is occurring.
